top.title: Israel orders evacuation of Lebanese city as conflict with Hezbollah escalates
top.summary: Israel's military tells residents of Tyre it will "act forcefully" against the armed group, after another wave of strikes in south and east Lebanon.

top.title: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
top.summary: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.

top.title: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
top.summary: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.

top.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
top.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
